title: Senior Teacher - IIM Lucknow - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Lucknow - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!
